positive: A symmetrical, highly stylized illustration of cosmic flora and interwoven astronomical elements. The main subject features geometric interpretations of jungle vines, stylized moon phases, and glowing planetary rings, arranged in a central, repeating pattern. Use a clean vector art aesthetic combined with mid-century modern graphic illustration style. The color palette must utilize extreme contrast: deep midnight indigo and saturated matte black background contrasted by brilliant neon cyan, electric magenta, and lime green bioluminescence. Emphasize crisp linework, sharp silhouettes, and flat, graphic color blocking suitable for screen printing on fabric. Minimal shading, maximum contrast, perfect symmetry, highly decorative, repeating tile pattern.
